---
title: "Agenda"
---

The workshop will take place on **Saturday, August 1, 2026**.

Below is the agenda from the 2023 Preparing to Teach workshop. The schedule 
for the 2026 workshop will take a similar structure, but may explore slightly 
different topics and will likely have different presenters.

| Time | Session | Presenter(s) |
|:------------------|:---------------------------------|:------------------|
| 8:15 - 9:00 | Welcome and introductions | Claire Kelling |
| 9:00 - 9:45 | Teaching-focused careers | Andrew Bray |
| 9:45 - 10:30 | Statistics and data science education research | Mine Dogucu |
| 10:30 - 10:45 | Break ☕ |  |
| 10:45 - 11:30 | Your first year as faculty / early career faculty | Annie Tang |
| 11:30 - 13:00 | Lunch 🍽️ + Roundtable discussions | See list of topics below! |
| 13:00 - 14:00 | Teaching intro data science and assessing learning | Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel |
| 14:00 - 15:00 | Teaching intro stats and assessing learning | Jo Hardin |
| 15:00 - 15:15 | Break ☕ |  |
| 15:15 - 16:15 | Equity-focused teaching | Video by Jennifer Ward & Panel Discussion |
| 16:15 - 16:30 | Wrap-up and moving forward | Allison Theobold |
| 16:30 | Group picture! |  |

## Round table discussions

-   Getting started with grant writing
-   Mentoring undergraduate projects, research, and extra curriculars (e.g., Datafest)
-   Negotiating Your Job Offer
-   Choosing a Textbook
-   Teaching Coding
-   Applying for Teaching-focused Positions
-   Getting Job Application Materials Ready
